content.en:
Time flies.

Ten solstices have passed.

At this time, the human race gave birth to a large number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords, including many Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, all of which were the credit of those resources that Ye Tian brought back.

However, Ye Tian's cultivation had not improved much, and it would take some time to break through to the peak realm of the Dao Realm.

It's a pity that he has only killed one Supreme Dao Strange Thing in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm over the years, and he has not encountered other Supreme Dao Strange Things.

As for the eighth sequence of the Dao rule, it has now been upgraded to the realm of three into one, which is okay.

In addition, he created several Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and his strength improved a lot.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

A pale figure returned, the armor on its body already shattered.

When this supreme realm returned, a venerable powerhouse appeared.

"Baizhan Tianzun, why are you back???"

The other Wuji Heavenly Palace powerhouses were surprised.

Baizhan Tianzun said helplessly: "A group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Supreme Dao Void Demons attacked the Luohe Fortress, and I saw that the situation was not good, so I fled directly. "

"What, Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable, once the Luohe Fortress misses, I'm afraid that those guys will have to question our Wuji Heavenly Palace!" the other Wuji Heavenly Palace powerhouses said worriedly.

"Don't worry, it's a big deal to directly divide a part of the territory into a battlefield, share a little pressure for them, and this matter will pass!"

"That's fine!"

The other Wuji Heavenly Palace powerhouses nodded.

Anyway, it's not the first time they've done this kind of thing.

Soon after, a piece of news came that the Luohe Fortress was breached by the Dao Void Demon, and many of them did not flee from the Dao Realm, suffering heavy losses.

And the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable of the Wuji Heavenly Palace was naturally questioned.

A mysterious void.

One phantom after another appeared, and one of them was the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable of the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

"Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable, Luohe Fortress was attacked, you, as one of the six Sevenfold Dao Realms of Luohe Fortress, were the first to escape, causing Luohe Fortress to miss, how do you say to punish you!" another Sevenfold Highest Dao Realm questioned.

Baizhan Tianzun said indifferently: "Everyone, I am willing to use one territory of the Wuji Domain as one of the battlefields to share a little pressure for the other battlefields, how about it?"

"Oh, in that case, that's fine. But at the very least, it must be a third-level battlefield, and the territory area cannot be small. A sevenfold Dao realm made a request.

"No problem!" Hundred Battles Tianzun nodded.

Subsequently, he listed the territory divided into the battlefield: "Everyone, this is this area, although this area is barren in energy, but there is no problem as a battlefield, and this territory is vast enough, equivalent to one-twentieth of the territory of the Infinite Domain!"

These Sevenfold Dao Realms were a little dumbfounded, and they had to admit that the Infinite Heavenly Palace was really ruthless, and they gave up one-twentieth of the territory of the Infinite Realm in one go.

If it were them, they would never be able to do it.

However, this territory is definitely not the main territory of Wuji Heavenly Palace, otherwise it would not be directly ceded.

But they don't care, the entire Wuji Domain is currently respected by the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and only the Wuji Heavenly Palace has the right to speak, and the other forces in the Wuji Domain have no right to speak, even if they are all destroyed, they will not find trouble with the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

"Then it's decided, arrange the third-level battlefield array as soon as possible, and open the Void Passage when the time comes, lure some of the Dao Void Demons into the battlefield, and relieve the pressure on other battlefields!"

After these sevenfold supreme realms finished speaking, they dispersed the illusory shadows.

And the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable also dispersed the phantom, and his consciousness returned to the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Several other Heavenly Venerables looked at the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable.

The Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable asked, "Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable, what do you say over there?"

"Naturally, I agreed!" Baizhan Tianzun said lightly: "Luohe Fortress is not an extremely important fortress, if we pay a little price, they will naturally agree." Although it is indeed possible for me to wait until the help arrives if I hold on, if I can't hold on, I will die. Sacrifice me to keep the Luohe Fortress, then I will definitely not do it. Now like this, without harming the interests of our Wuji Heavenly Palace, the problem will be solved, how good!"

"That's right!" the six Heavenly Venerables laughed.

Suddenly, the Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable asked: "Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable, if the third-level battlefield is arranged, those Supreme Dao Void Demons break into the third-level battlefield, and they have to be sent to the Dao Realm to fight them, otherwise if this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons does not stay, they will leave directly, and the pressure on other battlefields will not be relieved, and they will definitely still make trouble for us!"

"It's true that we need to send a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons in, but I didn't say that we must go in the Supreme Dao Realm of the Wuji Heavenly Palace!" In addition, we have a lot of forces under our command, let them send them to the Dao Realm. In addition, most of the territories we have chosen belong to the True Dao Mountain, and only a few belong to us. True Dao Mountain was enveloped in a third-level battlefield, and they would definitely stop those Supreme Dao Void Demons. "

"Yes, the strength of the True Dao Mountain is not bad, they will definitely resist and stop the Supreme Dao Void Demon, at least they can hold on for a while. In addition, Zhendao Mountain is under the command of Taisu Palace, and it is impossible for Taisu Palace to die without saving. Moreover, Taisu Palace is also worried that the battlefield will expand into their territory, and they will definitely be sent to the Dao Realm as well. In addition, we can also issue an order for the major forces to send some to the Dao Realm. Six Cry Tianzun said with a smile.

In this way, they do not lose, but other forces will lose a lot.

"Without further ado, let's immediately arrange the third-level battlefield array!"

Baizhan Tianzun urged.

......

The territory where the True Dao Mountain and the surrounding small forces are located is called the True Dao Domain of the Infinite Domain.

This area is extremely vast, but the resources are poor, and there are not many strong people, but there are quite a few Dao realms.

Many forces, such as the True Dao Mountain and the Liuli Golden Palace, had not yet sensed the danger and were still cultivating as usual.

Abrupt.

Outside this area, a Venerable Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm descended, and there were many Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms.

They directly put the prepared formation base and began to arrange the three-level battlefield array.

Rumble!!!!!

An invisible barrier enveloped the entire True Dao Domain.

In an instant, the Supreme Dao Realms of the True Dao Mountain, the Glazed Golden Palace, and other forces sensed it.

They felt that their territory had been stripped out of the Infinite Domain, and their faces changed drastically.

Since it wasn't the first time, they all guessed what happened.

"It's not good, our True Dao Domain has been stripped out of the Infinite Domain, this is the rhythm of being pulled into the battlefield!"

The face of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm powerhouse of the True Dao Mountain changed drastically.

He never thought that this kind of thing would be the turn of the True Dao Domain, the key is that the Wuji Heavenly Palace was too shameless, without any notice, and directly sent them into the battlefield.

If it is notified, the True Dao Mountain can completely withdraw from the True Dao Domain!

"The despicable and shameless Infinite Heavenly Palace!!!"

The Lord of the True Way roared.
